scripts:
<script>
        (function(){
            try {
                var carouselEl = document.getElementById('carousel-8a80806d863be43201865b9ad98703fc');
                var controlContainer = document.getElementById('carouselControlContainer-carousel-8a80806d863be43201865b9ad98703fc');
                var prevBtnEl = document.getElementById('prevBtn-carousel-8a80806d863be43201865b9ad98703fc');
                var nextBtnEl = document.getElementById('nextBtn-carousel-8a80806d863be43201865b9ad98703fc');
                var indicatorsEl = document.getElementById('carouselIndicators-carousel-8a80806d863be43201865b9ad98703fc');

                function updateBoundaryButtons(toIndex) {
                    try {
                        var items = carouselEl.querySelectorAll('.carousel-item');
                        var total = items ? items.length : 3;
                        if (prevBtnEl) {
                            if (toIndex === 0) prevBtnEl.classList.add('hide'); else prevBtnEl.classList.remove('hide');
                        }
                        if (nextBtnEl) {
                            if (toIndex === total - 1) nextBtnEl.classList.add('hide'); else nextBtnEl.classList.remove('hide');
                        }
                    } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
                }

                window.addEventListener('load', function(){
                    try {
                        var active = carouselEl && carouselEl.querySelector('.carousel-item.active');
                        var idx = 0;
                        if (active) {
                            idx = Array.prototype.indexOf.call(carouselEl.querySelectorAll('.carousel-item'), active);
                        }
                        updateBoundaryButtons(idx);

                        var showControls = 3 > 1;
                        if (controlContainer) controlContainer.style.display = showControls ? 'flex' : 'none';
                        if (indicatorsEl) indicatorsEl.style.display = showControls ? 'flex' : 'none';
                        if (prevBtnEl) prevBtnEl.style.display = (!prevBtnEl.classList.contains('hide') && showControls) ? 'flex' : 'none';
                        if (nextBtnEl) nextBtnEl.style.display = (!nextBtnEl.classList.contains('hide') && showControls) ? 'flex' : 'none';
                    } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
                });

                if (carouselEl && carouselEl.addEventListener) {
                    carouselEl.addEventListener('slide.bs.carousel', function(event){
                        try {
                            var toIndex = event && event.to !== undefined ? event.to : 0;
                            updateBoundaryButtons(toIndex);
                        } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
                    });
                }
            } catch (e) { console.warn('carousel script error', e); }
        })();
        </script>

wysiwyg_basic:16:mmw6izo3ut6hj01upy.name: WYSIWYG
wysiwyg_basic:16:mmw6izo3ut6hj01upy.html:
The Mission

Our mission is to enable all young people, especially those who need us most, to reach their full potential as productive, caring, responsible citizens.

 

The Vision

Our vision is to provide a world-class experience that assures success is within reach of every young person who enters our doors, with all members on track to graduate from high school with a plan for the future, demonstrating good character and citizenship, and living a healthy lifestyle.

 

The Plan

Our programs weave together academics, enrichment, recreation and character formation. By promising a brighter future for our youth and making a commitment to our community, we’re healing lives, inspiring leaders for life, and creating a path to successful careers.

We strive to develop strong citizens who raise families without barriers, live hope-filled lives and give back to their community.

 

Events

Check out our upcoming events and a look back at past events to learn about everything from our annual Run for Hope fundraiser to National Night Out.

 

Follow Us @SalArmyRVARSYC

Support and Empower Youth

  

Donate and support youth today!

Follow Us @SalArmyRVARSYC

Support and Empower Youth

  

Donate and support youth today!

wysiwyg_basic:17:mmw6izo4x37jz3rbc4.name: WYSIWYG
wysiwyg_basic:17:mmw6izo4x37jz3rbc4.html:
The Salvation Army Central Virginia Red Shield Youth Center is a place for your kids to laugh. A place to learn. A place to grow. A place to belong.

Our programming focuses on our core program areas of education, character development, health and lifestyle, arts, morality, and sports.

After school, children have a designated environment to continue their education and work on homework. Before breaking into recreational programs, children receive a nutritious snack and do devotionals as a group.

Our Summer Day Camp is designed to prevent summer learning loss. Summer learning loss stacks up from year to year, broadening the achievement gap between lower- and higher-income youth. We offer developmentally appropriate, project-based learning materials to help keep children educated and engaged throughout the summer.

2025-2026 AFTER-SCHOOL PROGRAM
REGISTER TODAY (AGES 6-18)

VIEW 2025-2026 AFTER-SCHOOL FLYER
(for children and teens of all interests)
 

OUR YOUTH CENTER IS A SAFE PLACE FOR YOUR CHILD TO

  • BELONG with their community of peers
  • THRIVE socially and develop interpersonal skills
  • LEARN new concepts and grow in their academic confidence
  • NOURISH their bodies (daily meal provided)

PROGRAMS TO EMPOWER AND INSPIRE INCLUDE

  • STEM lab equipped with 3D printers
  • Music recording and production
  • Team sports
  • Rec leagues (pickleball, dodgeball, basketball)
  • Money Matters
  • Life Empowerment
  • Swim lessons provided by SwimRVA
  • Homework help
  • College prep

FOLLOW US ON FACEBOOK AND INSTAGRAM @SALARMYRVARSYC

     

CORE PROGRAM AREAS

  1. Education and Career Development
  2. Character and Leadership Development
  3. Health and Life Skills
  4. The Arts, Sports
  5. Fitness and Recreation
  6. Spiritual Development

AFTER-SCHOOL COSTS FOR 2025-2026

  • AFTER-SCHOOL REGISTRATION FEE:
    • One-time, non-refundable, $15 registration fee.
       
  • PROGRAM FEE:
    • Monthly fee of $75 per child + $25 transportation (see below)
       
  • NEW IN 2025: Monthly transportation fee of $25 per child
    • Qualifying schools: Bellevue, Chimborazo and Henry Marsh Elementary ONLY.
       
  • REMINDER: Camps during the school year are a separate cost. These include but are not limited to Winter Break and Spring Break Camps.

 

EDUCATION & CAREER
Programs in Education and Career Development enable youth to strengthen educational disciplines, critical thinking to daily occurrences, and embrace technology to achieve across a variety of career fields.

HEALTH & LIFE SKILLS
Programs in Health and Life Skills support young people’s ability to engage in positive behaviors that nurture personal well-being, align with goal setting, and enable them to live successfully as self-sufficient adults. 

CHARACTER & LEADERSHIP
Character & leadership development programs empower youth to support and influence their friends and community, develop respect and appreciation for others, foster a strong self esteem and participate in the democratic process.

MORALITY & VALUES
Morality & values programs provide youth with the opportunity to learn about and develop their relationship with God and how faith plays a role in everyday life.

SPORTS & FITNESS
Sports and fitness programs develop a positive experience and association around fitness and develop critical social and stress management skills.

ARTS
Arts programs allow youth to harness their creativity through multi-platform use and knowledge including visual arts, crafts, performing arts and creative writing.

design:columns:2 Columns:23:mmw6izom9s17.name: 2 Columns
design:columns:2 Columns:23:mmw6izom9s17.html:
The Mission

Our mission is to enable all young people, especially those who need us most, to reach their full potential as productive, caring, responsible citizens.

 

The Vision

Our vision is to provide a world-class experience that assures success is within reach of every young person who enters our doors, with all members on track to graduate from high school with a plan for the future, demonstrating good character and citizenship, and living a healthy lifestyle.

 

The Plan

Our programs weave together academics, enrichment, recreation and character formation. By promising a brighter future for our youth and making a commitment to our community, we’re healing lives, inspiring leaders for life, and creating a path to successful careers.

We strive to develop strong citizens who raise families without barriers, live hope-filled lives and give back to their community.

 

Events

Check out our upcoming events and a look back at past events to learn about everything from our annual Run for Hope fundraiser to National Night Out.

Follow Us @SalArmyRVARSYC

Support and Empower Youth

  

Donate and support youth today!
